description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features an exposed tubular frame chassis, providing both structural rigidity and a rugged, utilitarian aesthetic. The vehicle is equipped with four large, robust wheels fitted with all-terrain tires, and a visible spare tire is mounted at the rear. The open cockpit design includes two bucket seats, a round steering wheel, and minimal body panels, emphasizing its lightweight and performance-oriented build. Prominent off-road lighting is mounted above the windshield, and the suspension system is clearly visible, suggesting high ground clearance and excellent off-road capability. The color scheme combines matte tan and black, with metallic accents on the wheels and frame. The overall design is optimized for agility, durability, and occupant safety, as evidenced by the integrated roll cage.
description: A rugged, open-frame all-terrain vehicle with four large wheels, a visible roll cage, and a rear-mounted spare tire. Its tan and black color scheme and exposed suspension highlight its off-road readiness.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tubular frame, off-road lights above the windshield, and the wide stance of the front wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open cockpit, visible steering wheel, and the rear-mounted spare tire.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the spare tire, rear suspension, and the protective roll cage structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open frame, seating, and the vehicle's overall length.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires feature a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves, designed for optimal traction on both loose and hard surfaces.
